entries.label: Git Operations (Push + Post + History)          | --git
entries.note: Git menu has no dedicated OpenClaw adapter contract.

entries.label: YouTube DAEs (Live/Comments/Shorts/Indexing)    | --youtube
entries.note: Comments/indexing/scheduling are exposed; full YouTube submenu parity is not guaranteed.

entries.label: HoloDAE (Code Intelligence & Search)            | --holodae
entries.note: Search path is exposed; HoloDAE operational submenu controls are not directly mapped.

entries.label: AMO DAE (Autonomous Moderation Operations)      | --amo
entries.note: Intent route exists but not full AMO menu parity.

entries.label: Social Media DAE (0102 Autonomous)              | --smd
entries.note: LinkedIn/X/social campaign commands are directly handled.

entries.label: Liberty Alert DAE (Community Protection)        | --liberty-dae
entries.note: No dedicated Liberty Alert DAE route in OpenClaw intents.

entries.label: PQN Orchestration (Research & Alignment)        | --pqn
entries.note: PQN research/teaching/demo/publish paths are routed.

entries.label: Liberty Alert (Mesh Alert System)               | --liberty
entries.note: Liberty mesh alert option is not represented in OpenClaw routes.

entries.label: FoundUps Vision DAE (Pattern Sensorium)         | --vision
entries.note: Vision DAE launch path is not exposed as a dedicated OpenClaw route.

entries.label: All DAEs (Full System)                          | --all
entries.note: No single 'all DAEs' orchestration route in OpenClaw.

entries.label: Check Instance Status & Health                 | --status
entries.note: OpenClaw monitor reports health, but not full main-menu status pipeline.

entries.label: Exit
entries.note: Interactive exit option (not a DAE capability).

entries.label: Qwen/Gemma Training System (Pattern Learning)
entries.note: Training system menu path has no dedicated OpenClaw route.

entries.label: MCP Services (Model Context Protocol Gateway)  | --mcp
entries.note: MCP services menu is not directly mapped through OpenClaw intents.

entries.label: Automation Dependencies (Chrome + LM Studio)  | --deps
entries.note: Dependency launcher is not exposed as a dedicated OpenClaw route.

entries.label: FoundUps Ecosystem (FAM + Simulator + Demo)  | --fam
entries.note: FoundUp launch paths are routed; full ecosystem menu parity is broader.

entries.note: Follow-WSP contract is available in CLI; OpenClaw uses generic command routing.

entries.note: Native OpenClaw/IronClaw menu and chat/voice paths.

entries.note: Dashboard-like health snapshots are exposed, not full dashboard UX.

entries.note: Explainer content can be queried, but no dedicated explainer route.

entries.note: OpenClaw includes explicit Connect-WRE command handling.

entries.note: antifaFM broadcaster has no dedicated OpenClaw route.
